top_signals.title: ECB Hikes With Lagarde Warning That Inflation Risk Is Spreading
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank raised interest rates for the first time in almost three years, with President Christine Lagarde warning inflation triggered by the Iran war is widening beyond just energy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump threatens to seize 'total control' of Iran's oil industry including key export terminal Kharg Island
top_signals.summary: Trump said the forthcoming operations to take over Iran's oil infrastructure, and its oil and gas markets, would be similar to U.S. actions in Venezuela.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: From Pyongyang to Primorsk: When Sanctions Evasion Becomes System Design
top_signals.summary:
Rarely a week passes without a new story about Russia’s shadow fleet. Tankers catch fire in the Mediterranean, are added to sanctions lists, or are boarded while passing through European waters. But the bigger story is not the vessels that are caught, but those that aren’t — ships moving between registries, ports, shell companies, and service providers that obscure their ties to Russia while keeping a sanctioned state afloat. The vessels that do get sanctioned are the visible tip of a larger scheme that North Korea spent years running, and Russia has refined at scale.Shadow fleets are typically studied in

The post From Pyongyang to Primorsk: When Sanctions Evasion Becomes System Design appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Canton Network developer raises $355 million to bring Wall Street onchain
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Figure to acquire Kiavi for $717 million to expand RWA tokenization network
top_signals.summary: Figure said moving Kiavi assets onchain could reduce costs while maintaining a capital-light, high-margin business model.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Tether leads $1.4 billion funding round in German robotics company Neura
GitHub announces npm security changes to tackle supply-chain attacks
top_signals.summary: GitHub has announced that npm v12, expected next month, will introduce several security-focused changes aimed at blocking supply-chain attacks abusing behaviors triggered by the 'npm install' command. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
